theme: From ordinary meetings to extraordinary experiences

linkedin.text:
Your top performers don't need another bonus.
They need to feel valued.

Last quarter, we took 200 sales leaders from a leading Israeli company to Barcelona for a 3-day incentive trip.

What we delivered:
→ A rooftop dinner overlooking the city at golden hour
→ A private cooking masterclass with a Michelin-starred chef
→ A team challenge across the Gothic Quarter
→ An awards ceremony they'll remember for years

The result?
• 94% said it was "the best company event ever"
• Voluntary turnover dropped 31% in the following quarter
• 3 other divisions asked for the same experience

Great events don't cost money. They make money.

Planning something for your team? Let's talk.
📩 alon@upe.co.il | 🌐 upe.co.il

#CorporateEvents #IncentiveTravel #EmployeeRetention #Barcelona #TeamBuilding #EventProduction #HRLeadership #UproductionEvents
